hero_subtitle: Premium transfer service in Île-de-France. Fixed price, certified drivers, available 24/7.
step_1_desc: Choose your route from our destinations or enter a custom address.
step_2_desc: Select the vehicle according to your needs: Sedan, Business, Van or Luxury.
step_3_desc: Pay online and receive immediate confirmation by SMS and email.
included_sign: Meet and greet with name sign
fleet_subtitle: Exceptional vehicles for every occasion. All our vehicles are black, recent, and perfectly maintained.
faq_flight_q: What happens if my flight is delayed?
faq_flight_a: We track your flight in real time. If your flight is delayed, your driver adjusts automatically at no extra cost.
faq_someone_q: Can I book for someone else?
faq_someone_a: Yes, you can book for a different passenger. Simply enter their details at checkout.
faq_delay_q: How far in advance should I book?
faq_delay_a: We recommend booking at least 2 hours in advance. For long-distance transfers, 24 hours is preferred.
faq_cancel_a: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before your ride. After that, fees may apply.
faq_vehicles_q: What is the difference between vehicles?
faq_vehicles_a: Sedan: up to 3 passengers. Business: executive finish. Van: up to 7 passengers. Luxury: top-tier, exclusive experience.
home_tagline: The excellence of prestige transportation, at the service of your time.
service_chauffeur_desc: Airport transfers, business travel, on-demand service. Fixed price, punctuality guaranteed.
service_tourism_desc: Private Versailles, Champagne Route, Paris by Night. Exclusive experiences for discerning clients.
pillar_1_desc: Our chauffeurs follow a strict code of confidentiality. What happens in our car, stays there.
pillar_2_desc: Real-time tracking, anticipating the unexpected. You never wait. We are there before you.
pillar_3_desc: Water, chargers, daily press, wifi. Every journey is designed to be an experience in itself.
home_final_desc: Book online in 2 minutes or contact our concierge available 24/7.
corporate_hero_subtitle: Elevate your business travel with Capitale Transfer. We provide tailored transportation solutions designed for the demands of the modern executive.
corporate_feature_1_desc: Dedicated account management for frequent business travelers and executive teams.
corporate_feature_2_desc: Simplified accounting with detailed monthly statements and VAT-compliant invoices.
corporate_feature_3_desc: Our chauffeurs are trained in executive protocols, ensuring privacy and confidentiality.
corporate_feature_4_desc: Reliable service across all departments in Île-de-France, from airports to business districts.
corporate_discretion_p1: We understand that for our B2B clients, the car is often an extension of the office. Our chauffeurs provide a quiet, professional environment where you can work or rest in total peace.
corporate_discretion_p2: From roadshows to regular airport transfers, we ensure your team is always where they need to be, exactly when they need to be there.
tourism_hero_subtitle: Experiences designed for those who refuse the ordinary. Your private chauffeur, your itinerary, your pace.
tourism_exp_subtitle: Bespoke experiences designed for a clientele that accepts only the best.
tourism_quote: "Every detail counts. Every moment deserves to be perfect."
tourism_custom_desc: Our experts accompany you in designing a unique program, adapted to your desires and schedule.
exp_private-tour_desc: Discover Paris with a licensed guide exclusively dedicated to your group. Monuments, anecdotes, behind the scenes of the capital.
exp_car-tour_desc: Visit Paris aboard a prestige sedan with a driver-guide. All the must-sees, at your pace.
exp_museums_desc: Louvre, Orsay Museum, Pompidou Center — with an expert guide, no waiting. Skip-the-line access included.
exp_day-trips_desc: Versailles, Giverny, Étretat, Fontainebleau, Deauville. Unforgettable days departing from Paris in a luxury vehicle.
exp_night_desc: Nocturnal tour in a prestige sedan. Eiffel Tower, Montmartre, Alexander III Bridge — with champagne served on board.
exp_gastro_desc: Transfer & reservation to the best Michelin tables. Exceptional dinners with the agreement of your concierge.
exp_champagne_desc: Moët & Chandon, Ruinart, Krug houses. Private tasting and visit of the cellars in a prestige vehicle.
exp_families_desc: Routes adapted to children and parents. Interactive museums, parks, monuments — with a pedagogical guide.
exp_couple_desc: Tailor-made romantic routes: boat trip, intimate dinner, discovery of the most beautiful corners of Paris.
exp_solo_desc: Dedicated Paris Planner: local advice, personalized itineraries, discreet accompaniment to enjoy to the maximum.
exp_historical_desc: Art, architecture, history of Paris. Notre Dame, the Marais, Montmartre, the catacombs — told by an expert.
exp_custom_desc: You choose, we create. 100% tailor-made itinerary designed with our concierge according to your desires and budget.
sp_recommended: Recommended by the finest Parisian establishments
testimonial_1_text: Three years our teams have been using Capitale Transfer for our international clients. No incidents, no delays. Unquestionable reliability.
testimonial_2_text: I have used chauffeur services on three continents. Paris with Capitale Transfer is in another dimension — the care given to every detail, the discretion, the silence.
testimonial_3_text: We recommend Capitale Transfer to our residents exclusively. Alignment with our service standards was immediate. Our clients thank us.
testimonial_4_text: Absolute discretion. Irreproachable punctuality. I would not entrust my travels to anyone else. Two years, not a single bad surprise.
testimonial_5_text: Arrived at CDG at 11 PM after a two-hour delay — the driver was there, calm, with my name. No questions asked. That's real service.
about_hero_subtitle: Capitale Transfer was founded on a simple principle: that private transportation should be a seamless, premium experience centered around the human behind the digital request.
about_human_desc: While we utilize the latest technology to ensure precision and reliability, we believe the essence of luxury lies in the human connection. Our chauffeurs are not just drivers; they are professionals dedicated to your safety, comfort, and peace of mind.
about_quality_desc: From our fleet of meticulously maintained vehicles to our multilingual concierge team, every aspect of Capitale Transfer is designed to meet the highest international standards of luxury service.
about_paris_desc: Headquartered in the heart of Paris, we possess an intimate knowledge of the city's streets, rhythms, and requirements. We are your local partner in a global world.
contact_hero_subtitle: Our concierge team is available 24/7 to assist with your bookings, special requests, or corporate account inquiries.
book_manual_quote_desc: For custom routes, an operator will respond within 15 minutes with an exact price.
book_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address (e.g. name@domain.com).
book_cash_card: Cash or card directly to the driver.
book_confirmed_desc: A confirmation email has been sent to the address you provided.
book_geolocation_denied: Location access was denied. Enable it in your browser settings or enter the address manually.
book_geolocation_error: Could not get your position. Try again or type the address.
book_reverse_geocode_error: No address found for this position. Enter the pickup manually.
book_select_suggestion_hint: Pick an address from the list to set the map pin and fare.
book_datetime_required: Please set pickup date and time.
book_pricing_error: Could not calculate the fare for this route. Check the addresses.
st_transfer_desc: CDG, Orly & Le Bourget airports, Parisian train stations, luxury hotels, castles, and theme parks. Pickup and drop-off anywhere in Île-de-France.
st_disposition_desc: A vehicle with an assigned chauffeur for the desired duration. Ideal for busy days, multiple visits, or continuous business travel.
st_events_desc: Weddings, galas, award ceremonies, corporate cocktails. Impeccable service for your most important events, with vehicle decoration on request.
st_excursions_desc: Private excursions in prestige vehicles from Paris: Versailles, Fontainebleau, Deauville, the vineyards of Burgundy, or the Côte d'Azur. Custom duration and itinerary.
home_final_desc: Enjoy an excellent service with a fixed, clear and guaranteed pricing.
home_tagline: The elegance and punctuality of a premium chauffeur service, designed for your highest expectations.
service_chauffeur_desc: Airport transfers, train stations, on-demand service, and events. A premium fleet and discreet chauffeurs for all your professional or personal travels.
service_tourism_desc: Discover French heritage in prestige vehicles. Personalized itineraries, from Versailles to the Champagne vineyards, with exclusive guidance.
